sentences.arabic: يَتَمَيَّزُ المَطْبَخُ العَرَبِيُّ بِتَنَوُّعِهِ الثَّقَافِيِّ الكَبِيرِ وَنَكَهَاتِهِ الغَنِيَّةِ الَّتِي تَعْكِسُ تَارِيخَ المِنْطَقَةِ وَجُغْرَافِيَّتَهَا.
sentences.translation: Arapsku kuhinju karakteriše velika kulturna raznolikost i bogati ukusi koji odražavaju historiju i geografiju regije.
sentences.translationEn: Arab cuisine is characterized by its great cultural diversity and rich flavors that reflect the region's history and geography.

sentences.arabic: تَلْعَبُ التَّوَابِلُ مِثْلَ الكَمُّونِ وَالقِرْفَةِ وَالزَّعْفَرَانِ دَوْرًا مِحْوَرِيًّا فِي إِضْفَاءِ طَابَعٍ مُمَيَّزٍ عَلَى الأَطْبَاقِ التَّقْلِيدِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Začini poput kima, cimeta i šafrana igraju ključnu ulogu u davanju prepoznatljivog karaktera tradicionalnim jelima.
sentences.translationEn: Spices such as cumin, cinnamon, and saffron play a pivotal role in giving a distinctive character to traditional dishes.

sentences.arabic: لَا يُعَدُّ تَنَاوُلُ الطَّعَامِ مُجَرَّدَ حَاجَةٍ بَيُولُوجِيَّةٍ، بَلْ هُوَ طَقْسٌ اجْتِمَاعِيٌّ يَجْمَعُ العَائِلَةَ حَوْلَ مَائِدَةٍ وَاحِدَةٍ فِي جَوٍّ مِنَ الأُلْفَةِ.
sentences.translation: Jelo se ne smatra samo biološkom potrebom, već je društveni ritual koji okuplja porodicu oko jedne trpeze u atmosferi bliskosti.
sentences.translationEn: Eating is not considered a mere biological need, but is a social ritual that gathers the family around one table in an atmosphere of intimacy.

sentences.arabic: تَشْتَهِرُ بِلَادُ الشَّامِ بَالمُقَبِّلَاتِ المَعْرُوفَةِ بِـ "المَزَّةِ"، بَيْنَمَا تُعْرَفُ دُوَلُ الخَلِيجِ وَالمَغْرِبِ العَرَبِيِّ بِأَطْبَاقِ الأَرُزِّ وَالكُسْكُسِيِّ الدَّسِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Levant je poznat po predjelima zvanim 'meze', dok su zemlje Zaljeva i Magreba poznate po obilnim jelima od riže i kuskusa.
sentences.translationEn: The Levant is famous for appetizers known as 'mezze', while the Gulf countries and the Arab Maghreb are known for hearty rice and couscous dishes.

sentences.arabic: تَعْتَمِدُ جَوْدَةُ الطَّعَامِ عَلَى اسْتِخْدَامِ المَكَوِّنَاتِ الطَّازَجَةِ وَزَيْتِ الزَّيْتُونِ الصَّافِي، مِمَّا يَجْعَلُهُ صِحِّيًّا وَلَذِيذًا فِي آنٍ وَاحِدٍ.
sentences.translation: Kvalitet hrane zavisi od upotrebe svježih sastojaka i čistog maslinovog ulja, što je čini zdravom i ukusnom istovremeno.
sentences.translationEn: The quality of food depends on the use of fresh ingredients and pure olive oil, making it healthy and delicious at the same time.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ تَنَاوُلَ وَجْبَةٍ عَرَبِيَّةٍ هُوَ رِحْلَةٌ عَبْرَ الزَّمَنِ تَسْتَحْضِرُ قِصَصَ التِّجَارَةِ وَالتَّبَادُلِ الثَّقَافِيِّ بَيْنَ الشُّعُوبِ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje arapskog obroka je putovanje kroz vrijeme koje priziva priče o trgovini i kulturnoj razmjeni među narodima.
sentences.translationEn: Eating an Arab meal is a journey through time that evokes stories of trade and cultural exchange between peoples.
